case_title: RUSSELL, ROCHELLE A. VS ANDREW, CYNTHIA F.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RUSSELL, ROCHELLE A. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREW, CYNTHIA F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY ANDREW, CYNTHIA F. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RUSSELL, ROCHELLE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-18-1999, OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, ROCHELLE A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREW, CYNTHIA F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, ROCHELLE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREW, CYNTHIA F. $4,665.33 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,720.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ANDREW, CYNTHIA F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RUSSELL, ROCHELLE A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREW, CYNTHIA F.
